title: Proper Horse Development

annotations.note: The central pawn is protected by two properly developed horses.

moves.note: Red has developed both horses, ensuring that when one initiates an attack, the other can still defend the central pawn.

initial_position_annotation: Proper horse refers to developing the horse toward the center, strengthening the central pawn's defense while maintaining the other horse's attacking mobility, forming a flexible structure that balances offense and defense.
